zh.Inverness, Highland, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭希倫德音巴內斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Sandilands於大約1156年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親Harry De Sandylands33歲，母親Mrs. Harry De Sandylands33歲。她和Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh至少有6個兒子。她去世在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Inverness, Highland, Scotland: 英国苏格兰希倫德音巴內斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Sandilands于大约1156年出生在英国苏格兰时，她的父亲Harry De Sandylands33岁，母亲Mrs. Harry De Sandylands33岁。她和Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh至少有6个儿子。她去世在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Sandilands
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish: locative name from Sandilands in Carmichael (Lanarks).

variants.name: Sandiland
meanings: 1  English: locative name from one or more unidentified places in England described as or named ‘sandy land’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Sandilands was born about 1156, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Harry De Sandylands, was 33 and her mother, Mrs. Harry De Sandylands, was 33. She had at least 6 sons with Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh. She died in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Sandilands est née environ 1156, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Harry De Sandylands, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Harry De Sandylands, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh. Elle est décédée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Sandilands um 1156 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Harry De Sandylands 33 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Harry De Sandylands 33. Sie hatte mit Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Sandilands è nata il circa 1156 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Harry De Sandylands, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Harry De Sandylands, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli con Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh. Morì nel Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Sandilandsが約1156年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Harry De Sandylandsは33歳，母Mrs. Harry De Sandylandsは33歳であった。彼女はShaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintoshとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女はスコットランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Sandilands(이)가 대략 1156년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Harry De Sandylands(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Harry De Sandylands(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 스컷랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Sandilands nasceu aproximadamente 1156, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Harry De Sandylands, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Harry De Sandylands, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh. Ela faleceu em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Sandilands родилась около 1156 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Harry De Sandylands было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Harry De Sandylands, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh. Она умерла в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Sandilands nació aproximadamente 1156, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Harry De Sandylands, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mrs. Harry De Sandylands, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Shaw Oig Mackintosh 2nd of Clan Mackintosh. Murió en Scotland.
